scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run check:i18n
scripts.cf:build: npm run build:pre:local && npm run cf:build:raw
scripts.cf:preview: npm run cf:build && wrangler dev --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:deploy:dry-run: npm run build:pre:remote && npm run cf:build:raw && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --dry-run
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build:pre:remote && npm run cf:build:raw && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.cf:deploy:ravelloh: npm run build:pre:remote -- --database DB --env ravelloh && npm run cf:build:raw && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --env ravelloh
scripts.ci:deploy:dry-run: npm run build:pre:remote && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --dry-run
scripts.ci:deploy: npm run build:pre:remote -- --database DB && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.ci:deploy:ravelloh: npm run build:pre:remote -- --database DB --env ravelloh && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml --env ravelloh
scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply insightflare --config wrangler.toml --local
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply insightflare --config wrangler.toml --remote
scripts.d1:migration:create: wrangler d1 migrations create insightflare --config wrangler.toml

DAILY_SALT_SECRET.description: Enter a random string longer than 16 characters for privacy-preserving visitor IDs.

DASHBOARD_SESSION_SECRET.description: Enter a random string longer than 16 characters for signing dashboard login sessions.

BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the default admin account. The default username is `admin`; if this is left empty, the default password is `insightflare`.

DB.description: D1 database used for analytics data, account data, and migrations.

SITE_SETTINGS_KV.description: KV namespace used for site tracking configuration read by `/script.js`.

INGEST_DO.description: Durable Object namespace used for ingest buffering, realtime state, and batched D1 writes.

ARCHIVE_BUCKET.description: Optional R2 bucket for cold archive storage. Leave it unbound unless you want to enable archive-to-R2.
